title: Flow
description: Configurable ease in-out inventory UI transitions.
body:
![](https://cdn.imb11.dev/requires_fabric_api.png) [![](https://cdn.imb11.dev/mineblock%20badge_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/UzHtJKqHny) [![](https://cdn.imb11.dev/modding-elite-badge.png)](https://ko-fi.com/mineblock11)

## Flow is on hold

Mojang's UI refactors across 1.21 have made updating Flow for 1.21.3, 1.21.4 and 1.21.5 near impossible. Should UI refactors calm down, Flow will be remade for a future update, at a minimum 26.1+. Contributions through PRs are welcome.

# Flow

Flow is a inventory UI animation mod that allows you to configure an ease in-out animation when opening and closing any inventory screens.

<iframe allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/NScf9A9OBFA" height="358" width="638"></iframe>

# Compatability

Flow is **likely already compatible with a wide range of mods**, but has built in fixes to work with many mods, such as EMI.

# Configuration

Flow has a wide range of configuration options, from background tint and blur, to the type of easing used to animate the movement in or out.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Eoxi2LJd/images/bd212a83426e1eac2d8b6779a77c2742367a63a0.png)

# Roadmap

- Animation directions, more complex transitions. Slide in from left/right etc.
- More configurable blur/tint animations.
